note: Canonical probe counts for the evidence campaign. No prose inference — these numbers are the truth.

campaign_scope.60_probe_reruns: regression_eval.py runs all 60 probes (6 domains). The 20 non-campaign probes (go, hive) are measured for regression monitoring but do not participate in campaign evidence.

anchors.note: Anchors are measurement targets. They are NOT in fit or holdout pools.

fit.note: Fit probes are measured during fit phase (Days 8-21) alongside anchors.

holdout.note: Holdout probes are measured during holdout phase (Days 23-29) only.

improvement_sensitive.use: Primary denominator for holdout improvement claims.

regression_sentinel.use: Non-regression confirmation only. NOT counted as improvement evidence.

categories_do_not_overlap.anchor_vs_fit: disjoint — no probe is both anchor and fit
categories_do_not_overlap.anchor_vs_holdout: disjoint — no probe is both anchor and holdout
categories_do_not_overlap.fit_vs_holdout: disjoint — no probe is both fit and holdout
categories_do_not_overlap.improvement_vs_sentinel: disjoint — every holdout probe is exactly one
categories_do_not_overlap.campaign_vs_non_campaign: disjoint — go and hive probes are not in any campaign role
